item2_leadership.note: Full leadership roster spans pages 26-29 with many officers/directors of DAL, SWSH, FWH, FWHT. Named individuals extracted where individually surfaced. Complete structured array would require line-by-line extraction of all names, which number in the dozens across multiple affiliated entities.

named_individuals.name: Benjamin Selden
named_individuals.role: CFO of SWSH, SUIPH, FWH, FWHT, DAL, Subway MyWay LLC

obligations: Must operate only at single approved site
May not exclude or control location of any other Subway
restrictions: May not sell from unapproved locations
Must get written approval for advertising methods
rights: May solicit orders from restaurant location
May relocate if lease terminates without fault (at own expense)

obligations: On-premises supervision required (franchisee or Designated Manager)
Must keep franchisor informed of DM identity
Must hire and manage all personnel
Must keep restaurant open within Operations Manual hours
restrictions: DM not required to own equity
Confidentiality obligation during and after term
Noncompete: no competitive business during term (anywhere) and 1 year post-term (3 miles)
rights: May employ DM instead of personal supervision
triggers: Franchisor may require DM training if standards not met (30-day notice)

obligations: Must offer all designated required goods
Must follow MOP decisions for market
Must comply with all Operations Manual methods and procedures
restrictions: May not operate any other business at location without written consent
May not sell any non-approved goods or services
Co-branding requires separate franchise agreement with third party
rights: May make SOP decisions for individual restaurant
May request waiver for market-level MOP decisions
